mapper.insert: INSERT INTO line (name, description, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, create_time, update_time FROM line WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, description, create_time, update_time FROM line ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT line.id AS line_id, line.name AS line_name, SUM(COALESCE(wo.quantity, 0)) AS total_plan_quantity, SUM(IF(wo.status = 2, wo.quantity, 0)) AS completed_quantity, SUM(IF(wo.status = 1, wo.quantity, 0)) AS producing_quantity, SUM(IF(wo.status = 0, wo.quantity, 0)) AS pending_quantity, SUM(IF(wo.status = 3, wo.quantity, 0)) AS closed_quantity FROM line LEFT JOIN work_order wo ON line.id = wo.line_id AND wo.create_time >= #{startTime} AND wo.create_time < DATE_ADD(#{endTime}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY line.id, line.name ORDER BY line.id
